Load-bearing values flagged · pending leadership ratification

Inputs

Acquisition SKUs are evaluated against the $2.00 absolute contribution floor only — per-channel GM floors are shown for context but do not block. Standard SKUs must clear every channel they ship to.

COGS composition vs. archetype bands optional · enter component costs to audit

▼
Composition bands are conversation-forcing, not blocking per Section 5.5. Out-of-band components require named justification but do not block launch.

Load-bearing numbers · pending ratification

  • 55% wholesale GM floor (§4.2)
  • $2.00 absolute contribution floor (§4.5)
  • 12% creator commission ceiling, marketplace (§6.3)
  • 25% acquisition-mix cap (§1.7)
  • Composition bands per archetype (§5.3)

Decision rights · §7.2

  • Archetype + designation: Nicole + Soraya jointly
  • MSRP / band: Alvin with Soraya
  • Landed COGS target: Nicole with sourcing
  • Channel set: Alvin with commercial leads
  • Exception approval: Alvin (consult Nicole/Soraya)
